name: Settings — Additional Services
content:
Additional Services
Configure FedEx special services including FedEx One Rate, insurance, and more for your shipments

FedEx One Rate®
Enable FedEx One Rate® [checkbox: checked]
Applicable only for Domestic US Shipments and If Box Packing is used for package generation (FedEx Boxes ONLY).
Save

FedEx® Delivery Signature Options
[dropdown: No Signature Required]
Options: No Signature Required, Indirect Signature Required, Direct Signature Required, Adult Signature Required
Save

Address Classification Settings
Enable FedEx Address Classification? [checkbox: checked]
Classification to be assigned if FedEx Address Classification is not enabled/available
[dropdown: Commercial]
Options: Commercial, Residential
Save

Third Party Insurance Settings
Is Third Party Insurance required for Forward Shipments? [checkbox: unchecked]
Third Party Insurance amount to be used:
[dropdown: Declared Value of Product]
Options: Declared Value of Product, Percentage of Product Price
Save

name: Settings — Rate Settings
content:
Rate Settings
Configure Rate Settings and Carrier Services for your shipments. This section includes all shipping services along with price adjustment options for rates.

Default product dimensions and weight
Length: 2.5 [unit dropdown: in]
Width: 2.5 [unit dropdown: in]
Height: 2.5 [unit dropdown: in]
Default weight for products (gm): 500
Save

Carrier Services [edit pencil icon — opens carrier services panel]
Fallback Services [edit pencil icon — opens fallback rate panel]

Display Rates for: [dropdown: Residential Addresses Only]
Options: Business and Residential Addresses, Business Addresses Only, Residential Addresses Only

Shipment Cut Off Time: 23:30

Display Rates: [dropdown: With tax]
Options: Without tax, With tax

Display Published/Account Rates: [dropdown: Account Rates]
Options: Account Rates, Published Rates

Include Duties and taxes in the rates at the checkout? [checkbox: unchecked]

Display Estimated Delivery Time for FedEx Services (If Available) [checkbox: checked]
Add Buffer Time For Estimated Delivery in Hours: 24
Save

Enable Debug Mode [checkbox: checked]

name: Settings — Return Settings
content:
Return Settings
Configure Return Label Settings for your shipments.

Generate Return Labels along with Forward Labels [checkbox: unchecked]
Is Third Party Insurance required for Return Shipments? [checkbox: checked]
Reason for Return: [dropdown: Rejected]
Options: Rejected, Damaged, Refused, Unknown, Other
FedEx® Delivery Signature For Return: [dropdown: No Signature Required]
Options: No Signature Required, Indirect Signature Required, Direct Signature Required, Adult Signature Required
more settings [link — expands additional return options]
Save

name: Settings — Notifications
content:
Notifications
Configure FedEx Event notifications and SMTP settings

Enable FedEx Notifications? [checkbox: checked]
Notification Role [dropdown]
Language Code: [dropdown: EN]
Format Specification: [dropdown: HTML]
Options: HTML, TEXT
Event Notification Type [dropdown]
Notify Customer On Order Fulfillment [checkbox: checked]
Save

SMTP Settings
Test SMTP Credentials [button]
SMTP Host: [empty]
SMTP User ID: [empty]
SMTP Password: [empty]
Email From: [empty]
Email Reply To: [empty]
SMTP Port: [empty]
